meaning: n.绝顶,最高点,黄金时代adj.出色的,极好的adv.非常好
examples: Her hair was thick, glossy and in tiptop condition.
He kept his villa in tiptop shape.
It's the tiptop honor that USA burgher can gain.
Some airlines assign special agents to escort tiptop customers, celebrities and CEOs to flights.
You don't even have to turn your computer on to execute system restoration and get your computer back into tiptop health.
